overview: The strongest supportive currents come through Guru and Shani and Rahu. Mixed stretches are shaped by Ketu and need timing awareness.
yearlyTheme: For the Tula Rasi (Libra) natives, the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram (March 19, 2026 – April 6, 2027) promises highly favorable results and prosperity due to the positive influence of Jupiter (Guru) throughout the year. Long-standing legal disputes and ancestral property issues will finally reach an amicable resolution, leading to significant financial gains and a more stable economic outlook, particularly for those in the finance sector or those seeking to acquire new land and property. While personal health may require extra attention as it might not be fully cooperative, the year shines for professionals in the arts, writing, and government sectors, who can expect newfound authority and immense reputation. Spiritually, you will find yourself more devoted, often spending generously on grand religious arrangements and organizing memorable pilgrimages or vacations for your family. Overall, while those with a weak Jupiter in their personal birth charts may see these effects slightly diminished, the majority of Libra natives will enjoy a high quality of life and comfort from paternal relations, especially during the surge of easy income predicted from October 31, 2026, onwards.

Long-standing legal disputes and ancestral property issues will finally reach an amicable resolution, leading to significant financial gains and a more stable economic outlook, particularly for those in the finance sector or those seeking to acquire new land and property.

planetaryInfluences.summary: For the Tula Rasi (Libra) natives, the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram (March 19, 2026 – April 6, 2027) promises highly favorable results and prosperity due to the positive influence of Jupiter (Guru) throughout the year. Long-standing legal disputes and ancestral property issues will finally reach an amicable resolution, leading to significant financial gains and a more stable economic outlook, particularly for those in the finance sector or those seeking to acquire new land and property. While personal health may require extra attention as it might not be fully cooperative, the year shines for professionals in the arts, writing, and government sectors, who can expect newfound authority and immense reputation. Spiritually, you will find yourself more devoted, often spending generously on grand religious arrangements and organizing memorable pilgrimages or vacations for your family. Overall, while those with a weak Jupiter in their personal birth charts may see these effects slightly diminished, the majority of Libra natives will enjoy a high quality of life and comfort from paternal relations, especially during the surge of easy income predicted from October 31, 2026, onwards.

During the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram (March 19, 2026 – April 6, 2027), Tula Rasi (Libra) natives will enjoy highly favorable results throughout the year due to the benevolent influence of both Jupiter and Saturn. Long-standing legal disputes and ancestral property issues that have persisted for years will finally be resolved amicably, leading to significant financial gains and the fulfillment of your desire to secure a permanent home or land for your family. This year is particularly auspicious for those aspiring for children, as it promises the birth of healthy offspring, while those in the judiciary, arts, and government sectors will receive exceptional honors, constitutional positions, and professional growth. Young aspirants seeking to join the Indian Army will see their dreams realized, and overall, you will gain the wisdom to correct past mistakes and handle others with newfound diplomacy and tact. While personal health may require some care, the absence of Sade Sati (Elinaati Shani) combined with a surge in easy income starting from October 31, 2026, ensures a period of great respect, spiritual devotion, and paternal happiness, allowing you to truly understand that the true meaning of earning wealth lies in the ability to enjoy it with family.

During the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram (March 19, 2026 – April 6, 2027), Tula Rasi (Libra) natives will experience highly favorable results from Jupiter and Saturn, though Rahu will introduce a mixed influence throughout the year. While long-standing legal disputes and ancestral property issues reach an amicable resolution and financial gains peak after October 31, 2026, Rahu brings specific challenges, particularly for those with Kala Sarpa Dosha in their personal horoscopes who may face hurdles regarding children. Pregnant women born under the Swati Nakshatra are advised to be extra cautious, especially after December 5, 2026, when Rahu’s influence shifts from supportive to challenging. Until early December, young individuals seeking love marriages will find family support, and your sociable nature will earn widespread respect and fame; however, the final months of the Telugu year may bring obstacles for students, false accusations from relatives, and intense disputes with maternal family members. Despite these late-year pressures and the need for health precautions, the absence of Sade Sati and the fulfillment of dreams—such as joining the Indian Army or securing high judicial and government positions—ensure that the majority of the year remains a period of significant achievement and spiritual growth.

During the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram, Tula Rasi natives will enjoy a highly prosperous year as Jupiter, Saturn, and Ketu all provide favorable alignments, while Rahu offers mixed results. Long-standing legal disputes and ancestral property issues will reach an amicable resolution, leading to significant financial gains and the fulfillment of your desire to secure a permanent home for your family. This year is auspicious for those aspiring for healthy offspring, though those with Kala Sarpa Dosha or pregnant women of Swati Nakshatra should exercise extra caution, particularly after December 5, 2026. While the year shines for professionals in the judiciary, arts, and government, and offers young aspirants a chance to join the Indian Army, Ketu specifically brings benefits through friends and a newfound sense of inner peace in decision-making. You will find yourself traveling to favorite destinations and visiting sacred pilgrimages, with new opportunities constantly arising to increase your income, especially after October 31, 2026. Although the latter part of the year may bring some obstacles for students or disputes with maternal relatives due to Rahu’s shift, the overall absence of Sade Sati ensures that the majority of the year remains a period of great respect, spiritual growth, and familial happiness.

monthlyHighlights.summary: Financial income will see a noticeable increase this month, and efforts toward constructing a new home will prove successful. Your long-term plans and deep thinking will yield positive results, and you will find yourself reaching amicable compromises in ongoing disputes. This is a promising month for the unemployed, and those seeking a change of location or a job transition should move forward with their efforts. New investments are likely to be profitable, and there is a specific indication of gaining gold (Suvarna Labham) toward the middle of the month. Furthermore, with the support of your spouse, you will be able to win the approval and appreciation of the family elders.

This month, you will experience the fruits of your long-standing efforts toward the progress of your family members, leading to an increase in your family's social status and a restoration of former glory. You will enjoy great happiness and comfort with your spouse, and while the period between the 9th and 18th may bring slight challenges in your professional life, you will ultimately achieve success at the last minute. From the 20th onwards, all types of businesses will flourish, supported by excellent financial encouragement and a steady flow of income. Students aspiring for higher education abroad will see their dreams fulfilled, and celebrations regarding marriage or the birth of children will bring immense joy to the household. While you should put in intense efforts if seeking permanent residency abroad, be prepared for some distressing news regarding a family member in the final week. Please note that the 10th, 24th, 25th, and 26th of this month are not favorable dates for important activities.

At the beginning of this month, you may face mental tension due to arguments and disputes within your circle of friends. Additionally, your spouse's health issues may cause some concern, and it is vital for the youth to maintain strong self-control during this time. While income remains average, this is a favorable month for those seeking new job opportunities. You might find yourself burdened with unexpected responsibilities belonging to others, and it is strictly advised to avoid gambling as it will not yield any benefit. On a positive note, court disputes will likely be resolved in your favor. Between the 10th and 18th of the month, exercise extreme caution regarding any new ventures or dealings. By the final week, your personal experiences will serve as a guide to others. For young women of Tula Rasi, this month brings a realization of life's realities, helping you break free from illogical or unsuitable relationships.

This month, you may encounter significant adverse events in your marital life, alongside challenges involving your siblings. Business operations and overall income will remain average throughout this period. Those born under the Vishakha Nakshatra will find themselves traveling frequently. Employees can expect the anticipated support from their superiors, and your children will likely adopt new ways of thinking; however, failing to value their opinions could lead to friction within the household. Family-related expenses may slightly exceed your budget. Those in the political sphere should be cautious, as there is a risk of incidents that could harm your public reputation. Additionally, individuals involved in land sales may face government-related hurdles. On a positive note, the 5th, 9th, 11th, 13th, and 16th of this month are favorable dates, and you may proceed with making decisions on important matters.

There are strong indications that a new source of income will emerge this month, along with earnings from distant lands or foreign sources. However, you may face significant obstacles in ongoing house construction projects, and those in the vehicle buying and selling business will encounter specific challenges. Marriage alliance efforts made during the first and second weeks of the month are likely to be successful. By the third week, you should be mindful of personal health issues that may cause some distress. You may also face some irritation or pressure regarding promises or guarantees you made in the past. Fortunately, with the cooperation of family or friends, you will be able to complete your pending tasks, leading to more satisfying circumstances in the final week. Consulting with family elders will provide you with the valuable information you need. Please note that the 27th and 28th of this month are not favorable dates.

In this month as well, you will experience an increased workload in your career. It is essential to be cautious regarding your health and dietary habits, and it is advised to let go of any egoistic tendencies. Your grown children, who are now coming into their own, will help reduce your financial debt burden. It is better to avoid being stubborn or getting into confrontations with your spouse's relatives. Financial income may decrease slightly this month, and you might have to undertake travels that do not yield any results. However, from the 26th to the 30th of the month, you will see the expected positive outcomes. This is an excellent period for all efforts related to auspicious events and ceremonies.

In this month, you may experience persistent irritation due to health issues related to headaches. You might also encounter situations that could lead to feelings of humiliation or loss of face. While your financial income remains average, you will find that money arrives just in time to meet your rising expenses. This is not a favorable month for long-distance travel, and it is better to dedicate your time to mental relaxation and bonding with family members. It may be difficult to see results that match your hard work this month. Additionally, those in the agricultural sector may face losses due to crop damage or grain loss. To mitigate these effects, it is recommended to perform a Navagraha Mandaparadhana Shanti Homam.

In the first and second weeks of this month, the health of maternal relatives may be a cause for concern. You are likely to experience mental unrest due to family conflicts, and unexpected financial expenses may arise from vehicle-related problems or accidents. Making unilateral decisions could further complicate your issues, so it is advisable to seek legal counsel or professional advice. From the 17th onwards, positive results will begin to manifest as family situations gradually improve. Efforts regarding foreign residency will be successful, and those facing disputes in their marital life will see a favorable turning point. It is important not to distance yourself from friends and relatives during this time. Additionally, this is a good period to launch new business ventures.

In this month, your financial income will be as strong as expected, and people from all walks of life will find their economic situations quite satisfying. New acquaintances and relationships will prove beneficial, and efforts toward marriage alliances will move forward rapidly. In your professional life, you will achieve the advancement or promotion you have been desiring; however, this is a time to handle your colleagues with wisdom and tact. You may undertake sudden but fruitful travels. On the other hand, romantic affairs may lead to financial losses. Between the 10th and 12th of the month, you may face situations that lead to feelings of resentment toward your spouse, teachers, or friends. You will find yourself inclined toward charity and will develop an impartial, balanced perspective toward everyone. Overall, you are likely to gain wealth in one form or another this month.

In this month, the efforts of newlywed couples seeking children will be successful, and it is an auspicious time for the purchase of a new vehicle. Financial income will remain strong, allowing you to successfully complete your planned tasks. This is also a favorable period to restart projects that were previously put on hold. You will enjoy the company of virtuous people; however, you may face situations that cause concern regarding the stability of your siblings' lives. Be aware that the advice you offer others may not be valued at this time, so it is important to act with maturity and tact to maintain your dignity. Any money owed to you is likely to be recovered this month. Between the 8th, 9th, and 10th, there are signs of a family-related problem arising. Additionally, in your professional life, you may face a transfer or relocation to a place that is not to your liking.

This month will be highly profitable. Efforts toward starting new businesses or securing new job opportunities will be successful, and your financial income remains strong. You will likely acquire new items or furnishings for your home, leading to great mental satisfaction and happiness. While middle-aged individuals may experience minor health fluctuations, there are strong indications of gaining through inheritance. However, this is not a favorable time for house construction efforts. In the final week, you will see a significant rise in your personal reputation and respect within society.

In this month, you will participate in festive gatherings and celebrations. You will be able to successfully design and plan new ventures, and your professional life will see the growth and progress you have been expecting. Favorable changes will take place in your life just as you desired, and you will be able to make excellent use of every opportunity that comes your way. Efforts related to marriage and children will yield positive results, and your financial income will also see an increase. It is a good time for students, as they will perform well in their studies. For starting any new tasks or important activities, the 14th, 15th, 24th, and 27th of this month are highly auspicious.

This month will also bring excellent results for Tula Rasi natives, with every effort you undertake reaching a successful conclusion. Your financial income will remain satisfactory, and there are strong indications of auspicious events (Shubhakaryam) related to your daughters within the family. During the second and third weeks, you may face health issues related to gastric or wind imbalances (Vata) due to irregular eating habits. By the final week, you will gain significant recognition for the work you have accomplished, and circumstances will arise where you may need to master a new skill or field of knowledge. All types of business dealings will be profitable, allowing the financial year to conclude on a highly successful note. Please be cautious on the 18th and 19th, as these dates are not favorable for health matters.

notes: OCR used page 1 of the local PDF capture.
Match status is based on heading, available metrics, available annual section markers, and first month marker.
